title: chore(deps): update dependency postcss-scss to v1.0.4 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [postcss-scss](https://github.com/postcss/postcss-scss) from `v1.0.2` to `v1.0.4`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v1.0.3`](https://github.com/postcss/postcss-scss/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​103)

* Remove development sections from published `package.json`.

---

### [`v1.0.4`](https://github.com/postcss/postcss-scss/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​104)

* Fix parsing inline cpmments inside selectors.

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>
